Chameleon Run

Race through dynamic platforming levels as a color-shifting chameleon! Your character runs automatically, gaining speed as you progress. Match your color (pink or yellow) to the platforms you land on, or face instant failure. Collect tokens, avoid black obstacles, and complete levels within time limits to earn stars and unlock new stages. Master precise jumps and color switches to achieve the fastest times!

Arrow Up / Space: Jump over gaps and obstacles | Arrow Left: Switch to Pink color | Arrow Right: Switch to Yellow color | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart (return to start screen)
